string.name: design_time_lorem_ipsum
string.value:
Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. Vivamus ullamcorper
        tempor metus, at varius tellus dignissim et. Fusce quis justo sollicitudin,
        feugiat mi in, accumsan erat. Fusce tempor, sapien ut luctus scelerisque,
        lectus nisi hendrerit odio, eget mattis lorem massa id eros. Integer consequat
        tellus eu rhoncus pellentesque. Quisque et leo faucibus, aliquam nisi ut,
        feugiat lectus.

string.value: Unsubscribing removes the subscription including all its episodes, downloads, playback history, and statistics.

string.name: feed_delete_explanation_archive
string.value: Archiving hides the subscription from the list and stops looking for new episodes. Downloads, statistics and playback state are kept.

string.value: Please wait until the data is loaded

string.value: Please confirm that you want to delete the tag "%1$s".

string.name: confirm_mobile_feed_refresh_dialog_message
string.value:
Refreshing podcasts over mobile data connection is disabled in the settings.

Do you want to refresh anyway?

string.name: confirm_mobile_feed_refresh_dialog_message_vpn
string.value:
Your VPN app pretends to be a mobile network (metered connection). Refreshing podcasts over mobile data connection is disabled in the settings.

Do you want to refresh anyway? If you want this problem to be fixed, contact the creators of your VPN app.

string.name: delete_downloads_played_confirmation
string.value: Please confirm that you want to delete all played downloads.

string.name: play_this_to_seek_position_message
string.value: To jump to positions, you need to play the episode

string.name: visit_social_interact_confirm_dialog_message
string.value: Please make sure that you trust the website "%1$s".

string.name: delete_local_feed_confirmation_dialog_message
string.value: Deleting removes the episode from AntennaPod and deletes the media file from your device storage. It cannot be downloaded again through AntennaPod.

string.name: download_error_retrying
string.value: Download of "%1$s" failed. Will be retried later.

string.name: download_error_insufficient_space
string.value: There is not enough space left on your device.

string.name: download_error_parser_exception
string.value: The podcast host's server sent a broken podcast feed. We recommend checking with a podcast validator such as castfeedvalidator.com and contacting the podcast creator to let them know.

string.name: download_error_unsupported_type_html
string.value: The podcast host's server sent a website, not a podcast.

string.name: download_error_unsupported_type_html_manual
string.value: The address you entered is a website address, not a podcast RSS address.

string.name: download_error_not_found
string.value: The podcast host's server does not know where to find the file. It may have been deleted.

string.name: download_error_unknown_host
string.value: Cannot find the server. Check if the address is typed correctly and if you have a working network connection.

string.name: download_error_unauthorized
string.value: Authentication error. Make sure that username and password are correct.

string.name: download_error_forbidden
string.value: The podcast host's server refuses to respond.

string.name: download_error_wrong_size
string.value: The server connection was lost before completing the download

string.name: download_error_blocked
string.value: The download was blocked by another app on your device (like a VPN or ad blocker).

string.name: download_error_certificate
string.value: Unable to establish a secure connection. This can mean that another app on your device (like a VPN or an ad blocker) blocked the download, or that something is wrong with the server certificates.

string.name: null_value_podcast_error
string.value: The link you tapped does not contain a valid podcast URL. Please verify the link and try again, or search for the podcast manually.

string.name: no_feed_url_podcast_found_by_search
string.value: The suggested podcast did not have an RSS link, AntennaPod found a podcast that could match

string.name: confirm_mobile_download_dialog_message
string.value: Downloading over mobile data connection is disabled in the settings. AntennaPod can download the episode later automatically when Wi-Fi is available.

string.name: confirm_mobile_download_dialog_message_vpn
string.value:
- Using a VPN? Your VPN app pretends to be a mobile network (metered connection). If you want this problem fixed, contact the creators of your VPN app.
- Not using a VPN? Open the Android Wi-Fi settings and change the type of your Wi-Fi to not be metered.

string.name: confirm_mobile_streaming_notification_message
string.value: Streaming over mobile data connection is disabled in the settings. Tap to stream anyway.

string.name: playback_error_generic
string.value:
The media file could not be played.

- Try deleting and re-downloading the episode.
- Check your network connection, and make sure no VPN or login page is blocking access.
- Try long-pressing and sharing the "Media address" to your web browser to see if it can be played there. If not, contact the podcast creators.

string.name: bottom_navigation_deprecation_warning
string.value:
Unfortunately we have to remove side navigation in a future update. AntennaPod is developed by a small group of volunteers, and after maintaining both navigation styles for years, it has become too much overhead. 

If you absolutely rely on side navigation, please disable updates for AntennaPod in your app store.

string.name: report_bug_message
string.value: Sorry to hear something isn’t working. We’d love your help to improve AntennaPod. Please check our forum or GitHub to see if the issue has already been reported. If not, let us know and we’ll investigate.

string.value: Create a backup of the AntennaPod database every 3 days. Only keep the 5 most recent backups.

string.value: Access to external storage is required to read the OPML file

string.name: import_ok
string.value: Please press OK to restart AntennaPod

string.name: import_no_downgrade
string.value: This database was exported with a newer version of AntennaPod. Your current installation does not yet know how to handle this file.

string.value: Instead of always automatically enabling the sleep timer with one episode, please instead disable "continuous playback" in the settings.

string.name: time_dialog_invalid_input
string.value: Invalid input, time has to be an integer

string.name: multiple_sleep_episodes_while_continuous_playback_disabled
string.value: Continuous playback is disabled in the settings. Always stopping at the end of the episode.

string.name: auto_enable_label
string.value: Automatically activate the sleep timer when pressing play

string.name: auto_enable_label_with_times
string.value: Automatically activate the sleep timer when pressing play between %1$s and %2$s

string.name: synchronization_summary_unchoosen
string.value: You can choose from multiple providers to synchronize your subscriptions and episode play state with

string.name: gpodnet_description
string.value: Gpodder.net is an open-source podcast synchronization service that you can install on your own server. Gpodder.net is independent of the AntennaPod project.

string.name: synchronization_summary_nextcloud
string.value: Gpodder Sync is an open-source Nextcloud app that you can easily install on your own server. Gpodder Sync is independent of the AntennaPod project.

string.name: synchronization_host_explanation
string.value: You can pick your own server to synchronize with. When you have identified your preferred synchronization server, please enter its address here.

string.name: synchronization_nextcloud_authenticate_browser
string.value: Grant access using the opened web browser and come back to AntennaPod.

string.name: synchronization_credentials_explanation
string.value: Please provide the credentials of your account on the synchronization server.

string.name: gpodnetauth_encryption_warning
string.value: Password and data are not encrypted!

string.name: synchronization_selectDevice_explanation
string.value: Please select the device that you created on the synchronization server or create a new one.

string.name: gpodnetauth_finish_descr
string.value: Congratulations! Your gpodder.net account is now linked with your device. AntennaPod will from now on automatically sync subscriptions on your device with your gpodder.net account.

string.name: pref_gpodnet_setlogin_information_sum
string.value: Change the login information for your gpodder.net account.

string.name: synchronization_sync_summary
string.value: Synchronize subscription and episode state changes

string.name: synchronization_force_sync_summary
string.value: Re-synchronize all subscriptions and episode states

string.name: synchronization_login_status
string.value:
Logged in as %1$s on %2$s.

You can choose your synchronization provider again once you have logged out.

string.name: gpodnetsync_username_characters_error
string.value: Usernames may only contain letters, digits, hyphens and underscores.

string.name: nextcloud_login_error_generic
string.value:
Unable to log into your Nextcloud.

- Check your network connection.
- Confirm that you are using the correct server address.
- Make sure that the Gpodder Sync Nextcloud plugin is installed.

string.name: choose_data_directory_message
string.value: Please choose the base of your data folder. AntennaPod will create the appropriate subdirectories.

string.name: rating_tagline
string.value: Since %1$s, you played %2$s%3$d%4$s hours of podcasts.

string.name: rating_contribute_label
string.value: Want to join? Whether you want to translate, support, design or code, we would be happy to have you!

string.name: rating_volunteers_label
string.value: AntennaPod is developed by volunteers in their free time. Share your appreciation of their work by leaving a nice rating.

string.name: state_deleted_not_subscribed
string.value: You are not subscribed to this podcast yet. Subscribe for free to access it more easily and keep its playback history.

string.name: authentication_descr
string.value: Change your username and password for this podcast and its episodes

string.name: feed_tags_summary
string.value: Change the tags of this podcast to help organize your subscriptions

string.name: multi_feed_common_tags_info
string.value: Only common tags from all selected subscriptions are shown. Other tags stay unaffected.

string.name: episode_filters_description
string.value: List of terms used to decide if an episode should be included or excluded when auto downloading

string.name: exclude_terms
string.value: Exclude episodes containing any of the terms below

string.name: include_terms
string.value: Include only episodes containing any of the terms below

string.name: keep_updated_summary
string.value: Include this podcast when (auto-)refreshing all podcasts

string.name: edit_url_menu_summary
string.value: Risky: can permanently break episodes list, history, and playback state

string.name: edit_url_confirmation_msg
string.value: Changing the RSS address can easily break the playback state and episode listings of the podcast. We do NOT recommend changing it and will NOT provide support if anything goes wrong. This cannot be undone. The broken subscription CANNOT be repaired by simply changing the address back. We recommend creating a backup before continuing.

string.name: rss_address_invalid
string.value: The RSS address you entered is not valid.

string.name: reconnect_local_folder_summary
string.value: Risky: only re-connect to the exact same folder. Otherwise, you will lose all your playback state.

string.name: reconnect_local_folder_warning
string.value: In case of permission denials, you can use this to re-connect to the exact same folder. Do not select another folder.

string.name: local_feed_description
string.value: This virtual podcast was created by adding a folder to AntennaPod.

string.name: unable_to_start_system_file_manager
string.value: Unable to start system file manager

string.name: proxy_host_invalid_error
string.value: Host is not a valid IP address or domain

string.name: notification_channel_user_action_description
string.value: Shown if your action is required, for example if you need to enter a password.

string.name: notification_channel_refreshing_description
string.value: Shown while checking for new episodes.

string.name: notification_channel_playing_description
string.value: Allows to control playback. This is the main notification you see while playing a podcast.

string.name: notification_channel_download_error_description
string.value: Shown when download or feed update fails.

string.name: notification_channel_new_episode_description
string.value: Shown when a new episode of a podcast was found, where notifications are enabled

string.name: on_demand_config_stream_text
string.value: Looks like you stream a lot. Do you want episode lists to show stream buttons?

string.name: on_demand_config_download_text
string.value: Looks like you download a lot. Do you want episode lists to show download buttons?

string.name: pref_parental_control_require_subscribe_sum
string.value: Ask for the parental control password when subscribing to new podcasts

string.name: echo_home_subtitle
string.value: Your top podcasts and stats from the past year. Exclusively on your phone.

string.name: echo_queue_title_clean
string.value: And you're ready to make a clean start of the year. You have

string.name: echo_queue_title_many
string.value: And you still have quite a bit to go this year. You have

string.name: echo_queue_hours_clean
string.value: That's about %1$s each day until %2$d starts.

string.name: echo_queue_hours_normal
string.value: That's about %1$s each day until %2$d starts. You can start the year clean if you skip a few episodes.

string.name: echo_queue_hours_much
string.value: That's about %1$s each day until %2$d starts. Wait, what?

string.name: echo_listened_after_title
string.value: We've run some analysis on when episodes are released, and when you completed them. Our conclusion?

string.name: echo_listened_after_time
string.value: Typically, you completed an episode %1$s after it was released.

string.name: echo_hoarder_title
string.value: We've also been wondering: do you listen to the podcasts that you're subscribed to?

string.name: echo_hoarder_subtitle_hoarder
string.value: Looking at the numbers, we think you're a hoarder

string.name: echo_hoarder_comment_hoarder
string.value: Numbers don't lie, they say. And with only %1$d%% of your %2$d active subscriptions having been played this year, we're probably right.

string.name: echo_hoarder_comment_medium
string.value: You've played episodes from %1$d%% of your %2$d active subscriptions this year. How about checking out "%3$s" again?

string.name: echo_hoarder_comment_clean
string.value: You've played episodes from %1$d%% of your %2$d active subscriptions this year. We bet you keep your desk clean, too!

string.name: echo_thanks_we_are_glad_old
string.value:
for sticking with us this year!

You played your first episode with us in %1$s. It's been our honor to serve you since.

string.name: echo_thanks_we_are_glad_new
string.value:
for joining us this year!

Whether you've moved over from another app, or started your podcast adventure with us: we're glad to have you!

string.name: echo_thanks_now_favorite
string.value: Now, let's take a look at your favorite podcasts…

string.name: wearos_phone_not_supported
string.value: Phone not compatible. Make sure you are running the most recent version of AntennaPod from Google Play on your phone.

string.name: wearos_phone_not_reachable
string.value: Could not reach the phone. Make sure your phone is nearby and AntennaPod is installed.
